Telephone Appointment for SNAP Application Interview

Dear JAKE HALLETT,

A telephone interview appointment has been scheduled for you on 05/01/2026 at 11:00 A.M. DTA will call you at the time of
the appointment at the number you provided on your SNAP Application. This interview is required to complete your
application for SNAP benefits.

If you are unable to keep this telephone appointment you must contact DTA at 1-877-382-2363.

If DTA cannot reach you at this time because your line is busy or you fail to answer your phone, this will be treated as a
missed appointment.

Your request for assistance may be denied if you do not keep or reschedule this appointment.

Need help because of disability?
If you have trouble doing something we asked you to do because of a physical or mental health problem:
• call a Client Assistance Coordinator for help. Call 1-877-382-2363 and ask to speak to a Client Assistance
Coordinator.
• we may be able to give you extra help or adjust a rule. This is called an accommodation. Talk to a Client
Assistance Coordinator.

FSTELAPPTAP

documents.extracted_text:
Keep Your EBT Card and DTA Benefits Safe

dta
Department of
Transitional
Assistance

Lock Your EBT Card

DTA has a card-locking feature to protect your benefits from being stolen. You should keep your card locked
until you need to use it! To lock and unlock your card:

1. Go to DTAConnect.com or the DTA Connect mobile app and log in with your email and password.
2. Scroll to where you can see your EBT balance. On DTAConnect.com, press “View More.” On the mobile
app, press “Benefit Detail.”
3. Where you see your EBT Card Number, press “Lock EBT Card”.
4. You will see a pop-up that says, “Your card has been successfully locked.”
5. To unlock your card, follow the same steps and press “Unlock EBT Card.” Then you will see another
success message.

* If you do not have access to DTA Connect, you can also call the EBT Card Customer Service Line at
800-997-2555 and use their IVR system to unlock your EBT card 24/7! You cannot lock your card using IVR.
Change Your EBT Card PIN Frequently - Set a new PIN at least once a month before benefits are
issued.

Bloquee su tarjeta EBT

El DTA dispone de un sistema de bloqueo de tarjetas para evitar que le roben sus beneficios. Debe mantener la
tarjeta bloqueada hasta que necesite utilizarla. Para bloquear y desbloquear su tarjeta:

1. Visite DTAConnect.com o abra la aplicación móvil DTA Connect e inicie sesión con su correo electrónico y
contraseña.
2. Desplácese hasta donde pueda ver su saldo EBT. En DTAConnect.com, presione “View More” (Ver más).
En la aplicación móvil, presione “Benefit Detail” (Detalle de beneficios).
3. Donde puede ver el número de su tarjeta EBT, presione “Lock EBT Card” (Bloquear tarjeta EBT).
4. Verá una ventana emergente con el mensaje “Your card has been successfully locked” (Su tarjeta se ha
bloqueado correctamente).
5. Para desbloquear su tarjeta, siga los mismos pasos y presione “Unlock EBT Card” (Desbloquear tarjeta
EBT). A continuación, verá otro mensaje de éxito.

*Si no tiene acceso a DTA Connect, también puede llamar a la línea de atención al cliente de la tarjeta EBT al
800-997-2555 y utilizar su sistema IVR para desbloquear su tarjeta EBT las 24 horas del día, los 7 días de la
semana. No puede bloquear su tarjeta mediante IVR.
Cambie el PIN de su tarjeta EBT con frecuencia - Configure un nuevo PIN al menos una vez al mes
antes de que se emitan los beneficios.

EBT-PROTECT (10/2025)
27-001-1025-00

documents.extracted_text:
How to Use Your EBT Card

Benefit Availability Schedule:
You will receive your benefits on the same day(s)
every month based on your Social Security Number or
the placeholder number that DTA assigned to you.

SSN ending in    Cash/SNAP    Cash
0                1            16
1                2            17
2                4            19
3                5            20
4                7            22
5                8            23
6                10           25
7                11           26
8                13           28
9                14           29

Dates that fall on a holiday or Sunday will have
benefits available the day before.

How to Use Your EBT Card:
When making a SNAP or cash purchase with
your EBT card:

At the register, all allowable SNAP items will
be subtracted from your EBT card and once you
swipe and enter your PIN. For any items not
allowed for SNAP, such as toiletries and
house supplies, you can use your cash
benefits by swiping the card again, selecting
"EBT Cash" and entering your PIN for those
items.

To find out the balance on your EBT card,
go in to DTA Connect at DTAConnect.com or
the DTA Connect mobile app, or call
1-800-997-2555 and follow the
instructions to hear your balance(s).

For a list of eligible food items, visit:
https://www.fns.usda.gov/snap/eligible-fo
od-items

You can also shop online through
participating vendors. Visit
Mass.gov/SNAPonline for more
information.

Misuse of DTA Benefits:
• It is a crime to sell or trade your EBT card, PIN, or
benefits to others. Misuse of your DTA benefits
and EBT card may result in investigation by state
and/or federal authorities.
• Repeated replacement of your card may result in
a special investigation of your case. To report
misuse, call 1-800-372-8399.
• Breaking the rules will result in penalties including
but not limited to the disqualification from
assistance programs, recoupment of benefits, and
or referral for criminal prosecution.
• For more facts on misuse of your EBT card,
benefits, and other important information, please
visit the website below or call 1-800-372-8399.

Visit Mass.gov/EBT

Who Can Use Your EBT Card:
You can let other household members
use your EBT card. This includes
spouses, older children, and caretakers. If
you want to give permission for someone
else to use your card, ask DTA about an
"Assisting Person." Valid without photo.

Where You Can Use Your EBT Card:
You can use your EBT card to get your
benefits where you see these logos:

QUEST  NYCE

For SNAP and *Cash Benefits
• Ask us how you can get your cash benefits
direct deposited to your bank account!
documents.summary: How to Use Your EBT Card  Benefit Availability Schedule: You will receive your benefits on the same day(s) every month based on your Social Security Number or the placeholder number that DTA assigned

documents.extracted_text:
What You Cannot Use Your EBT Card For:
• Alcoholic beverages
• Court-ordered fees, fines, bail or bail bonds
• Firearms and ammunition
• Gambling and lottery tickets
• Jewelry
• Adult-oriented entertainment material
• Marijuana or marijuana products
• Tobacco products
• TVs, stereos, video games and consoles at rent-
to-own stores

Where You Cannot Shop or Use Your EBT
Card/Cash Benefits:
• Adult stores
• Firearm dealers
• Casinos
• Cruise ships
• Jewelry stores
• Liquor or marijuana stores
• Tattoo parlors
• Nail salons
• Cash transmittal agencies

It is illegal for these stores to accept cash benefits on a DTA EBT card for any transaction. View
penalties and details online at the website on this flyer or scan the QR code.

To report a prohibited purchase or sale, call 1-800-372-8399.

Protecting Your EBT Benefits from Fraud or Skimming:
• Never let anyone see you enter your Personal Identification Number (PIN). Do not write your
PIN on the card or other documents kept with the card. Do not bend or cut your card.
• Change your EBT card PIN monthly before each benefit issuance.
• Never provide your personal information, EBT card number, or PIN to unidentified callers.
• You should always lock your EBT card when not in use to keep benefits safe.
• Visit Mass.gov/ProtectYourEBT for more information.

When Should You Call EBT Card Customer Service:
• Call right away if you think your card is lost or stolen. For case questions or changes, call DTA.
• If you think a system error has transacted benefits incorrectly, you may file a claim for an
account adjustment by calling EBT Customer Service at 1-800-997-2555. You have 90 days from
the date of the suspected transaction error to file your claim.
• Be sure to have your EBT card number, DOB, and last 4 digits of your Social Security Number or
DTA assigned placeholder number when calling.

1-800-997-2555 - You can call EBT customer service 24 hours a day, 7 days a week.

Other Important Information:
• You can download DTA Connect on your smart phone or tablet. You can also access your
account online at DTAConnect.com to stay up to date on your case information.
• If you need to speak with a DTA staff member, call 877-382-2363.
• Need help or other resources? Call 211 or visit the website on this flyer/scan the QR code.

This institution is an equal opportunity provider.

documents.extracted_text:
Your PIN (Personal Identification Number)

• Your secret PIN is your electronic signature. It is a four number code that unlocks your
benefit account.

• You can select a PIN by calling 1-800-997-2555.

Uso seguro de su PIN (Número de identificación personal)

• Su PIN secreto es su firma electrónica. Es un código de 4 números que abre su cuenta de
beneficios.

• Elija un PIN llamando al 1-800-997-2555.

Servicio al cliente
1-800-997-2555

Llame las 24 horas del día, 7
días a la semana, si:

► Pierde o le roban su tarjeta.
► Alguien está usando su tarjeta sin su
permiso.
► Su tarjeta no funciona.
► Tiene preguntas sobre el uso de su tarjeta.

Información importante sobre su
tarjeta

► El hecho de haber recibido esta
tarjeta no quiere decir que sus
beneficios hayan sido aprobados.

► Tiene que proteger su tarjeta y el PIN.
NUNCA escriba su PIN en su tarjeta.

► Esta es su tarjeta permanente. Para
reemplazarla tendrá que pagar una cuota.
Si pierde o le roban la tarjeta, repórtelo
INMEDIATAMENTE al servicio al cliente:
1-800-997-2555.

► Es ilegal vender o intercambiar su tarjeta
EBT.

► Para clientes de SNAP, esta tarjeta puede
ser usada por cualquier integrante de su
familia.

¡NO BOTE ESTA TARJETA!
Firme la parte trasera de su tarjeta
inmediatamente

Consulte el folleto de EBT adjunto
para obtener más información
importante, como:

► Cómo usar su tarjeta EBT.
► Restricciones sobre dónde puede usar su
tarjeta EBT y qué puede comprar con ella.
► Horario de cuándo estará disponible su
beneficio cada mes.
► Los cargos que puede incurrir al usar su
tarjeta si recibe ayuda en efectivo.

Para denunciar fraude:

► Visite: www.mass.gov/dta/fraud o llame
a 1-800-FRAUD-99 (1-800-372-8399); o

► Para denunciar fraude con SNAP, visite:
www.usda.gov/oig/hotline.htm o llame al
1-800-424-9121
